title: Create: Reclaimed Rocks
description: Mod that brings back the removed blocks from Create mod.
body:
[![Discord](https://i.ibb.co/zPnkJRb/discord-dark.png)](https://discord.gg/baercraft) [![Kofi](https://i.ibb.co/TcMrMRf/kofi-dark.png)](https://ko-fi.com/subthy)
![logo](https://i.ibb.co/Df57nyq/MOD.png) Do you miss the blocks like dolomite, gabbro, and weathered limestone from Create? Blocks such as calcite just aren’t the same, so I wanted to reimplement the Create blocks that were removed post-1.18 and add some additional variants of them. With this mod, you can have them yet again! The base blocks are generated throughout your world, so you’ll need to travel to new chunks before you start seeing them! Don’t worry, there’s also all the original variants of these blocks along with the original slabs, stairs, and walls. ![tab](https://i.ibb.co/PQ3Yt5s/creative-tab.png) [**![Bisect](https://i.ibb.co/7NW2SY3/8d721697-200b-4168-81cd-f1daa8d8a680.png)**](https://bisecthosting.com/Subthy?r=ReclaimedRocks) ##### Credits: Dolomite, Weathered Limestone and Gabbro textures from Create mod Thank you kaupenjoe and his community for help of creating this mod
